name: tlsfetch-h2-web-sys
description: wasm-bindgen wrapper around tlsfetch-h2-common — exposes the HTTP/2 + gRPC client as a JS-callable class. JS-side drives the PumpedDuplex via push_inbound / take_outbound on top of a WasmTlsConnection (tlsfetch-web-sys) wrapped by a browser-native WebSocket or WebTransport adapter.
